full_text:
Meng Jie
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Jie. Ashamed of the Nanman revolt, he told Zhuge Liang how to cure his sick troops. Meng Jie is a fictional character. Meng Jie was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
